creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Update from libgcrypt-1.4.6 to libgcrypt-1.5.0 implies dependend ports to be rebuild, but this is not reflected in /usr/ports/UPDATE. Some ports fail to start after the update has been performed, like Anjuta (devel/anjuta).

Fix: 

Rebuild everything that is dependend on devel/libcrypt.
